laptops.query: MacBook with M series processor and at least 24GB RAM

gpu.query: GPU upgrade from GTX 1070, good value

keyboards.query: wireless mechanical keyboard, TKL or 65% or 75% layout (no numpad), tactile or linear switches (not clicky, not blue switches)

cameras.query: Interchangeable-lens mirrorless camera body or kit: Fujifilm X-T3, X-T4, X-T5, X-T50, X-S10, X-S20, or Sony A6400, A6500, A6600, A6700, ZV-E10, A7 IV, A7V, A7C, A7C II, A7CR, A1, A1 II. Not fixed-lens cameras (X100, RX100, etc), not lenses only, not security cameras, not action cameras.

camera-lenses.query: Photography lens for Fujifilm X-mount (XF or XC) or Sony E-mount (FE or E). Includes zoom lenses, prime lenses, and camera+lens kits/bundles. Not security cameras, not adapters only, not camera bodies without lenses.
